introSection: Voyage Dans Le Ciel (Japanese: リサとガスパールのそらたびにっき) is a Hoei Sangyo inverted roller coaster located at Fuji-Q Highland in Fujiyoshida, Yamanashi, Japan. The park's English website lists the ride as Lisa and Gaspard Dairy of Sky Journey.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Upon opening in 2001, this was a flying roller coaster called Birdmen. It was closed shortly after due to mechanical problems, and was turned into an inverted roller coaster in 2003.

fullText:
Voyage Dans Le Ciel (Japanese: リサとガスパールのそらたびにっき) is a Hoei Sangyo inverted roller coaster located at Fuji-Q Highland in Fujiyoshida, Yamanashi, Japan. The park's English website lists the ride as Lisa and Gaspard Dairy of Sky Journey.

Upon opening in 2001, this was a flying roller coaster called Birdmen. It was closed shortly after due to mechanical problems, and was turned into an inverted roller coaster in 2003.



Blue track and supports.
